name: Cashflow Lock
description: Current cashflow protects survival but also makes identity change feel expensive.
life_effect: The financial path needs an exit ladder rather than a single leap.

name: Skill-To-Asset Window
description: Skills can be converted into visible assets if they are packaged and tested externally.
life_effect: The person can create optionality before quitting or fully changing identity.

name: Status Consumption Pressure
description: Comparison pressure may pull money toward status defense instead of future mobility.
life_effect: Wealth mobility improves when money is treated as option-buying, not image repair.

name: Low Runway High Meaning
description: A meaningful change is desired before enough financial runway exists.
life_effect: Meaning must be tested in small paid or reputation-building forms before full transition.
